<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>

struct NetworkPacket {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::string username;
    std::vector<uint32_t> scores;
    std::string metadata;
    
    void serialise(auto& stream) {
        // Write packet_id as raw bytes
        stream.write(&packet_id, sizeof(packet_id));
        
        // Write username with length prefix
        stream << hexi::length_prefix(username);
        
        // Write scores count followed by elements using write_container
        stream << scores;
        
        // Write metadata as null-terminated string
        stream << hexi::null_terminated(metadata);
    }
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_packet(const NetworkPacket& packet) {
    hexi::BinaryStream stream;
    packet.serialise(stream);
    return stream.get_buffer();
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>

struct PacketHeader {
    uint32_t magic;
    uint16_t version;
    uint16_t flags;
};

    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    const uint8_t* read_ptr = adaptor.read_ptr();
    std::span<const uint8_t> header_span(read_ptr, sizeof(PacketHeader));
    
    PacketHeader header;
    header.magic = *reinterpret_cast<const uint32_t*>(header_span.data());
    header.version = *reinterpret_cast<const uint16_t*>(header_span.data() + 4);
    header.flags = *reinterpret_cast<const uint16_t*>(header_span.data() + 6);
    
    return header;
}
```</answer>

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

struct UserData {
    uint32_t user_id;
    std::string name;
    
    void serialise(auto& adaptor) {
        adaptor(user_id, name);
    }
};

std::vector<uint8_t> write_and_serialise_packet(uint32_t header, const UserData& data) {
    hexi::stream_write_adaptor<std::vector<uint8_t>> adaptor;
    
    adaptor.write(header);
    data.serialise(adaptor);
    
    return adaptor.get();
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>
#include <string_view>
#include <stdexcept>

struct MessagePacket {
    uint32_t header;
    std::string_view message;
};

MessagePacket read_header_and_message(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    uint32_t header = adaptor.read<uint32_t>();
    
    hexi::binary_stream stream = adaptor.stream();
    auto view = stream.view();
    
    auto null_pos = view.find('\0');
    if (null_pos == std::string_view::npos) {
        throw std::runtime_error("No null terminator found");
    }
    
    std::string_view message(view.substr(0, null_pos));
    return MessagePacket{header, message};
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/dynamic_buffer.h>
#include <vector>

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
void write_to_dynamic_buffer(hexi::dynamic_buffer<block_size>& buffer, uint32_t header, const std::vector<uint8_t>& data) {
    buffer.write(&header, sizeof(header));
    buffer.write(data.data(), data.size());
}

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
struct BufferData {
    uint32_t header;
    std::vector<uint8_t> data;
};

BufferData<> read_from_dynamic_buffer(hexi::dynamic_buffer<1024>& buffer, size_t data_length) {
    BufferData<> result;
    
    uint32_t header;
    buffer.read(&header, sizeof(header));
    result.header = header;
    
    result.data.resize(data_length);
    buffer.read(result.data.data(), data_length);
    
    return result;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/dynamic_buffer.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
std::vector<uint8_t> peek_data_from_buffer(const hexi::dynamic_buffer<block_size>& buffer, size_t bytes_to_peek) {
    const uint8_t* data = buffer.read_ptr();
    size_t available = buffer.read_size();
    
    size_t bytes_to_copy = std::min(bytes_to_peek, available);
    std::vector<uint8_t> result(data, data + bytes_to_copy);
    
    return result;
}

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/allocators/tls_block_allocator.h>
#include <hexi/detail/intrusive_storage.h>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t block_size = 1024, size_t allocator_count = 100>
using tls_allocator_type = hexi::tls_block_allocator<hexi::detail::intrusive_storage<block_size>, allocator_count>;

template<size_t block_size = 1024, size_t allocator_count = 100>
void enter_thread_with_allocator(tls_allocator_type<block_size, allocator_count>& allocator) {
    allocator.enter_thread();
}

template<size_t block_size = 1024, size_t allocator_count = 100>
void exit_thread_with_allocator(tls_allocator_type<block_size, allocator_count>& allocator) {
    allocator.exit_thread();
}
```

**Explanation:**  
The solution leverages the `hexi::tls_block_allocator`'s built-in thread lifecycle management. The `enter_thread_with_allocator` function calls `allocator.enter_thread()` to initialize thread-specific storage, while `exit_thread_with_allocator` invokes `allocator.exit_thread()` to clean up resources. These methods handle the internal thread-local storage setup and teardown required for proper TLS allocator operation.</answer>

#include <hexi/detail/intrusive_storage.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <algorithm>

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
std::vector<uint8_t> preview_data_without_consuming(const hexi::detail::intrusive_storage<block_size>& storage, size_t bytes_to_preview) {
    size_t readable_size = storage.readable_size();
    size_t copy_size = std::min(bytes_to_preview, readable_size);
    std::vector<uint8_t> dest(copy_size);
    const uint8_t* read_ptr = storage.read_ptr();
    std::copy(read_ptr, read_ptr + copy_size, dest.begin());
    return dest;
}

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
struct BufferStatus {
    size_t readable_size;
    size_t free_space;
};

BufferStatus<> check_buffer_status(const hexi::detail::intrusive_storage<1024>& storage) {
    size_t readable_size = storage.write_offset() - storage.read_offset();
    size_t total_capacity = storage.block_size() * storage.num_blocks();
    size_t free_space = total_capacity - storage.write_offset();
    return {readable_size, free_space};
}

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
void reset_buffer(hexi::detail::intrusive_storage<block_size>& storage) {
    storage.set_read_offset(0);
    storage.set_write_offset(0);
}
```</answer>

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/file_buffer.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <filesystem>

std::vector<uint8_t> read_file_data(const std::filesystem::path& file_path, size_t bytes_to_read) {
    hexi::file_buffer buffer;
    buffer.open(file_path, hexi::in);
    std::vector<uint8_t> data(bytes_to_read);
    size_t bytes_read = buffer.read(data.data(), bytes_to_read);
    data.resize(bytes_read);
    return data;
}

std::vector<uint8_t> preview_file_data(const std::filesystem::path& file_path, size_t bytes_to_preview) {
    hexi::file_buffer buffer;
    buffer.open(file_path, hexi::in);
    auto current_pos = buffer.tell();
    std::vector<uint8_t> data(bytes_to_preview);
    size_t bytes_read = buffer.read(data.data(), bytes_to_preview);
    data.resize(bytes_read);
    buffer.seek(current_pos);
    return data;
}

void write_file_data(const std::filesystem::path& file_path, const std::vector<uint8_t>& data) {
    hexi::file_buffer buffer;
    buffer.open(file_path, hexi::out | hexi::trunc);
    buffer.write(data.data(), data.size());
}

size_t get_file_size(const std::filesystem::path& file_path) {
    hexi::file_buffer buffer;
    buffer.open(file_path, hexi::in);
    return buffer.size();
}
```</answer>

    fb.close();

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/file_buffer.h>
#include <filesystem>

size_t get_file_readable_size(const std::filesystem::path& file_path) {
    Hexi::file_buffer buf(file_path);
    if (!buf.is_valid()) {
        return 0;
    }
    return buf.size();
}

bool is_file_buffer_valid(const std::filesystem::path& file_path) {
    Hexi::file_buffer buf(file_path);
    return buf.is_valid();
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_writer.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_reader.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/stream_adaptors.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <string>

struct UserData {
    uint32_t user_id;
    std::string name;
    
    void serialise(auto& stream) {
        stream << user_id << name;
    }
};

void serialize_object(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_writer& writer, const UserData& data) {
    hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor adaptor = writer.buffer_adaptor();
    data.serialise(adaptor);
}

void deserialize_object(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_reader& reader, UserData& data) {
    hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor adaptor = reader.buffer_adaptor();
    data.serialise(adaptor);
}
```

**Explanation:**
- The `serialize_object` function creates a `buffer_adaptor` from the `binary_stream_writer` and passes it to the `UserData` object's `serialise` method, which writes the data to the stream.
- The `deserialize_object` function similarly creates a `buffer_adaptor` from the `binary_stream_reader` and uses the same `serialise` method to read data from the stream into the `UserData` object.
- This approach leverages the dual-purpose `serialise` method for both operations, ensuring consistency and reducing code duplication.</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_writer.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_reader.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

void write_container_to_stream(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_writer& writer, const std::vector<uint32_t>& container) {
    // Write the count as a 32-bit unsigned integer
    uint32_t count = static_cast<uint32_t>(container.size());
    writer.write(count);
    
    // Write each element in the container
    for (const auto& element : container) {
        writer.write(element);
    }

std::vector<uint32_t> read_container_from_stream(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_reader& reader) {
    // Read the count first
    uint32_t count;
    reader.read(count);
    
    // Create a vector to hold the elements
    std::vector<uint32_t> result;
    result.reserve(count); // Reserve space for efficiency
    
    // Read each element and add to the vector
    for (uint32_t i = 0; i < count; ++i) {
        uint32_t value;
        reader.read(value);
        result.push_back(value);
    }
    
    return result;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

void skip_bytes_in_buffer(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, std::size_t bytes) {
    buffer.skip(bytes);
}

struct MessageHeader {
    uint16_t message_type;
    uint32_t body_length;
};

MessageHeader read_header_and_skip_body(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer) {
    MessageHeader header;
    buffer.read(&header, sizeof(header));
    buffer.skip(header.body_length);
    return header;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <string>
#include <string_view>

void write_string_prefixed_varint(hexi::binary_stream& stream, const std::string& str) {
    stream << hexi::prefixed_varint(str);
}

std::string read_string_prefixed_varint(hexi::binary_stream& stream) {
    std::string_view sv;
    stream >> hexi::prefixed_varint(sv);
    return std::string(sv);
}
```</answer>

#include <cstddef>

using namespace hexi::detail;

bool check_regions_overlap(const void* src, std::size_t src_len, const void* dst, std::size_t dst_len) {
    if (src_len == 0 || dst_len == 0) {
        return false;
    }
    const char* src_start = static_cast<const char*>(src);
    const char* src_end = src_start + src_len;
    const char* dst_start = static_cast<const char*>(dst);
    const char* dst_end = dst_start + dst_len;
    return (src_start < dst_end) && (dst_start < src_end);
}

bool safe_memory_copy(void* destination, const void* source, std::size_t length) {
    if (check_regions_overlap(source, length, destination, length)) {
        memmove(destination, source, length);
    } else {
        memcpy(destination, source, length);
    }
    return true;
}
```</answer>

ReadLimitInfo safe_read_with_limit_check(hexi::pmc::binary_stream& stream, void* destination, std::size_t length) {
    ReadLimitInfo info{0, 0, 0, false};

        // read successful, set occurred to false

    } catch (const hexi::stream_read_limit& ex) {

        info.total_read = ex.get_total_read();
        info.read_limit = ex.get_read_limit();
        info.occurred = true;
    }
    
    return info;
}

    hexi::write_prefixed_varint(adaptor, packet.data.size());
    hexi::write_bytes(adaptor, packet.data.data(), packet.data.size());
    
    return buffer;
}

#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_base.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstddef>

class CustomBuffer : public hexi::pmc::buffer_base {
    std::vector<std::byte> data_;
    
public:
    std::size_t size() const override {
        return data_.size();
    }
    
    bool empty() const override {
        return data_.empty();
    }
    
    // Helper method to add data (for testing)
    void add_data(const void* source, std::size_t length) {
        const std::byte* bytes = static_cast<const std::byte*>(source);
        data_.insert(data_.end(), bytes, bytes + length);
    }
    
    // Helper method to clear data (for testing)
    void clear() {
        data_.clear();
    }
};
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_read_adaptor.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_write_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

std::vector<uint8_t> write_and_read_data(const std::vector<uint8_t>& input_data) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;
    hexi::pmc::buffer_write_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    
    // Check available space before writing
    auto free_space = adaptor.free();
    
    // Write data to the buffer
    adaptor.write(input_data);
    
    // Create a read adaptor from the same buffer
    hexi::pmc::buffer_read_adaptor read_adaptor(buffer);
    
    // Read the data back
    std::vector<uint8_t> output;
    output.resize(read_adaptor.size());
    read_adaptor.read(output.data(), output.size());
    
    return output;
}

std::vector<uint8_t> peek_data_without_advancing(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer_data, std::size_t peek_size) {
    hexi::pmc::buffer_read_adaptor read_adaptor(buffer_data);
    
    // Peek at data without advancing the read pointer
    std::vector<uint8_t> peek_buffer(peek_size);
    read_adaptor.copy(peek_buffer.data(), peek_size);
    
    // Get pointer to current read position
    const uint8_t* ptr = read_adaptor.read_ptr();
    
    // Consume the peeked data
    std::vector<uint8_t> result(peek_size);
    read_adaptor.read(result.data(), peek_size);
    
    return result;
}
```</answer>

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_read_adaptor.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_write_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

struct TypedData {
    uint32_t id;
    int16_t value;
    double ratio;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> write_typed_data(const TypedData& data) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;
    hexi::pmc::buffer_write_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    adaptor.write(data.id);
    adaptor.write(data.value);
    adaptor.write(data.ratio);
    return buffer;
}

TypedData read_typed_data(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer) {
    hexi::pmc::buffer_read_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    TypedData data;
    adaptor.read(&data.id);
    adaptor.read(&data.value);
    adaptor.read(&data.ratio);
    return data;
}
```</answer>

using namespace hexi;

SensorInfo extract_sensor_info(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    auto stream = make_stream(buffer);
    std::string_view name;
    stream.view(name, [](char* strbuf, size_t size) {
        // Find null terminator within the first 'size' bytes
        for (size_t i = 0; i < size; ++i) {
            if (strbuf[i] == '\0') {
                strbuf[i] = '\0'; // Null-terminate the string
                return i + 1; // Return position after null terminator
            }
        }
        return size; // No null terminator found, use all bytes
    });
    
    // Enforce read bounds for sensor_id (4 bytes after the name)
    stream.enforce_read_bounds(sizeof(uint32_t));
    
    uint32_t sensor_id;
    stream.read(&sensor_id, sizeof(sensor_id));
    
    // Skip the remaining data
    stream.skip();
    
    return {sensor_id, name};
}

void serialise(auto& adaptor) const {
    adaptor.write(&sensor_id, sizeof(sensor_id));
    for (float temp : temperatures) {
        float converted = conditional_reverse(temp, std::endian::little);
        adaptor.write(&converted, sizeof(converted));
    }
    double converted_press = conditional_reverse(pressure, std::endian::little);
    adaptor.write(&converted_press, sizeof(converted_press));
}
